buttons.label: shutdown
buttons.action: hyprctl clients -j | jq -r '.[].pid' | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; systemctl poweroff

buttons.label: reboot
buttons.action: hyprctl clients -j | jq -r '.[].pid' | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; systemctl reboot

buttons.label: logout
buttons.action: hyprctl clients -j | jq -r '.[].pid' | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; pkill Hyprland || loginctl terminate-user $USER
